description: An extreme close-up of a pinball machine interior rendered in photorealistic detail. Three mushroom-shaped bumper caps are prominently visible, each marked with '100' and 'WHEN LIT' text on striped sunburst bases of white, gold, and blue. The playfield features vivid cosmic artwork in oranges, reds, and blues, including stylized demonic or monstrous faces and flame motifs. A chrome ball launcher or rail is visible at left. The word 'FLIPPERS' appears on a blue circular element at bottom center.
